chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 606 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of CMA No. 2669/26. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2026 Mr. Shahrukh Farogh Naseem, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, AAG. ---------- Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No. 2, 3, 4 & 5, and confirms that the Petitioner’s Appeal (Annexure “H”) remains pending before the Commissioner (Appeals). Under such circumstances, where the Petitioner is entitled to the benefit of adjudication through atleast one independent forum, the petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals) to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner without further delay, preferably within a period of 60 days’ from today, pending which no coercive action to be taken against the Petitioner for enforcing the underlying demand. Judge Judge Ayaz
